SR_CORE_FOOD_OVRL_SCRNG_IND 

LABEL: Screened Core HRSN Food Overall Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) core health related social need (HRSN) food composite indicator. 

LONG NAME: SR_CORE_FOOD_OVRL_SCRNG_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Did not screen positive for food need 
1 = Screened positive for food need 
Missing
